lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਗਰਬ ਤੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਵਿਕਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eis garab te chaleh bahut vikaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: So much sin and corruption comes from this pride. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬਿੰਦ ਤੇ ਸਭ ਓਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: braham bind te sabh opat hoee |2|
lines.english: They all emanate from the drop of God's Seed. ||2||
Everyone says that there are four castes, four social classes.
The Potter has shaped it into all sorts of vessels. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਦੇਹੀ ਕਾ ਆਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: panch tat mil dehee kaa aakaaraa |
lines.english: The five elements join together, to make up the form of the human body.
The entire universe is made of the same clay.
Who can say which is less, and which is more? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਕਰਮ ਬੰਧੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kehat naanak ihu jeeo karam bandh hoee |
lines.english: Says Nanak, this soul is bound by its actions.
Bhairao, Third Mehl:
- they are all asleep in egotism. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੫॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette mukat na hoee |5|1|
lines.english: Without meeting the True Guru, it is not liberated. ||5||1||
The Yogis, the householders, the Pandits, the religious scholars, and the beggars in religious robes
They are asleep, intoxicated with the wine of Maya.
One who has met the True Guru, remains awake and aware.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਨ ਮੂਸੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaagat rahai na moosai koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only those who remain awake and aware are not robbed. ||1||Pause||
He kills his self-conceit, and does not kill anyone else. ||3||
One who contemplates the essence of reality remains awake and aware.
Such a person overpowers the five thieves. ||2||
One who knows the One Lord remains awake and aware.
Of the four castes, whoever remains awake and aware
He abandons the service of others, and realizes the essence of reality. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨੇਤ੍ਰੀ ਹੋਇ ॥੬॥੨॥
lines.translit: giaan anjan jaa kee netree hoe |6|2|
lines.english: who applies the ointment of spiritual wisdom to his eyes. ||6||2||
Says Nanak, that humble being remains awake and aware,
is released from birth and death. ||5||
is attached to the Truth, and receives the fruit of Truth. ||1||
Whoever the Lord keeps in His Sanctuary,
Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸਿਉ ਕਰਹੁ ਪੁਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: re jan kai siau karahu pukaaraa |
lines.english: O mortal, unto whom will you complain?
This Creation was established by You.
The Hukam of the Lord's Command is pervasive; by the Hukam of His Command, all things happen. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਕਰਤ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਬਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khin meh binasai karat na laagai baaraa |2|
lines.english: In an instant You destroy it, and You create it again without a moment's delay. ||2||
By His Grace, He has staged this Play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te param pad paaeaa |3|
lines.english: By the Guru's Merciful Grace, I have obtained the supreme status. ||3||
Bhairao, Third Mehl:
Says Nanak, He alone kills and revives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਨ ਭੂਲਹੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: aisaa boojhahu bharam na bhoolahu koe |4|3|
lines.english: Understand this well - do not be confused by doubt. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾਂ ਕਰੇ ਭੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaan tis bhaavai taan kare bhog |
lines.english: When it pleases Him, He enjoys me.
As He inspires me, I adorn myself. ||1||
I am the bride; the Creator is my Husband Lord.
The One Lord Himself is pervading and permeating all. ||2||
How can anyone praise or slander anyone else?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tan man saache saahib jog |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am joined, body and mind, to my True Lord and Master. ||1||Pause||
By Guru's Grace, I am attracted by His Love.
I shall meet with my Merciful Lord, and vibrate the Panch Shabad, the Five Primal Sounds. ||3||
He alone meets with the Lord, whom the Lord Himself meets. ||4||4||
Bhairao, Third Mehl:
Prays Nanak, what can anyone do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਿ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: so mun ji man kee dubidhaa maare |
lines.english: He alone is a silent sage, who subdues his mind's duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਕਉ ਕੋਈ ਖੋਜਹੁ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eis man kau koee khojahu bhaaee |
lines.english: Let each person examine his own mind, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਖੋਜਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man khojat naam nau nidh paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Examine your mind, and you shall obtain the nine treasures of the Naam. ||1||Pause||
Subduing his duality, he contemplates God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mool mohu kar karatai jagat upaaeaa |
lines.english: The Creator created the world, upon the foundation of worldly love and attachment.
Attaching it to possessiveness, He has led it into confusion with doubt. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੈ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੁਝਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man kai veechaar hukam bujh samaanaa |3|
lines.english: By mental contemplation, the mortal realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command, and merges in Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਸਭ ਪਿੰਡ ਪਰਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis man te sabh pindd paraanaa |
lines.english: From this Mind come all bodies, and the breath of life.
